title: Bridge Essay: Modulation of the heartbeat evoked cortical potential by hypnotizability and hypnosis.
concept: Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
**Phase context:** Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

**Modulation of the heartbeat evoked cortical potential by hypnotizability and hypnosis.** — Psychophysiology (2023). DOI: 10.1111/psyp.14309. PMID: 37070749. Hypnotizability is a psychophysiological trait measured by scales and associated with several differences, including interoceptive accuracy and the morpho-functional characteristics of interoception-related brain regions.
